<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Remove the 'What to test' description with the given locale - IOS only"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/app-versions/{id}/beta-distribution/what-to-test/{what_to_test_id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Remove the "What to test" description with the given locale.
